pairs.projectTitle: EverMind-AI/EverOS: Portable Memory Agent Layer (7727⭐ Apache-2.0)
pairs.pairLogic: Project only: Stars > 5000 threshold met, OpenClaw official integration, MCP topics, skills directory, dual-track memory architecture. Forms 'Skills + MCP memory engineering' cluster with R435 Article: Skills/ (expertise layer) + EverMemos-MCP (connectivity layer) = 工程实现 of Anthropic 协议分工理论。
